execution_summary: Docker image built with rocker/verse and necessary R packages. After adjusting dependency names and implementing robust dataset path detection, the replicate_analysis.R script ran successfully inside the container. The linear mixed-effects model was fitted to 33,520 correct trials. The focal three-way interaction coefficient (NFC × trial × rewardlevel) was estimated and saved.

code_executed.logs: Generated Dockerfile with lme4, lmerTest, tidyverse.
Image built after adjusting package list.
code_executed.environment: Debian GNU/Linux, R 4.3 with lme4 1.1-34, lmerTest 3.1-3, tidyverse 2.0.0

code_executed.logs: Model converged; focal coefficient 0.00652, p = 0.182. Results written to /app/artifacts/focal_coefficient.csv

results.hypothesis_tested: Positive NFC × trial × rewardlevel interaction on logRT indicating reward reduces switch costs for low-NFC but not high-NFC individuals.

tables.table_description: CSV with coefficient, SE, t, p
